workflow_yaml:
workflow_id: english_news_to_chinese_markdown
version: "1.0"
description: "将英文新闻文章翻译为中文 Markdown，完全自动化流程"

workers:
  - id: translator_01
    model: claude-opus-4-6
    role: translator
    description: "核心翻译、预处理、格式化模块"
    max_attempts: 2
    timeout_seconds: 600
    
  - id: quality_checker_01
    model: claude-sonnet-4-6
    role: quality_reviewer
    description: "质量检查与最终验证模块"
    max_attempts: 2
    timeout_seconds: 300

tasks:
  - id: input_validation
    worker: translator_01
    step: 1
    name: "输入文件验证"
    description: "验证英文新闻文章格式、编码、内容完整性"
    input_binding:
      source_article: "${workflow.input.source_article}"
    output_binding:
      validated_content: "output"
    error_policy: "fail_fast"
    
  - id: text_preprocessing
    worker: translator_01
    step: 2
    name: "文本预处理与术语提取"
    description: "识别新闻结构，提取术语表，准备翻译数据"
    depends_on: [input_validation]
    input_binding:
      content: "${tasks.input_validation.output}"
    output_binding:
      preprocessed_data: "output"
    
  - id: core_translation
    worker: translator_01
    step: 3
    name: "核心翻译"
    description: "执行英→中翻译，保留原有逻辑结构和信息完整性"
    depends_on: [text_preprocessing]
    input_binding:
      preprocessed: "${tasks.text_preprocessing.output}"
    output_binding:
      translated_content: "output"
    config:
      translation_style: "natural_flow"
      terminology_guide: "${tasks.text_preprocessing.output.terminology_table}"
    
  - id: markdown_formatting
    worker: translator_01
    step: 4
    name: "Markdown 格式化"
    description: "应用 Markdown 语法（标题、链接、代码块等），确保格式完整"
    depends_on: [core_translation]
    input_binding:
      translated: "${tasks.core_translation.output}"
    output_binding:
      formatted_output: "output"
    config:
      markdown_dialect: "github_flavored"
      include_metadata: true
    
  - id: quality_assessment
    worker: quality_checker_01
    step: 5
    name: "质量检查与输出验证"
    description: "检查流畅度、准确性、格式完整性；验证输出文件有效性"
    depends_on: [markdown_formatting]
    input_binding:
      content: "${tasks.markdown_formatting.output}"
      original_article: "${workflow.input.source_article}"
    output_binding:
      final_output: "output"
    config:
      quality_threshold: 0.85
      auto_fix_minor_issues: true
    
  - id: output_export
    worker: quality_checker_01
    step: 6
    name: "输出导出"
    description: "生成最终 Markdown 文件，保证编码正确（UTF-8）"
    depends_on: [quality_assessment]
    input_binding:
      final_content: "${tasks.quality_assessment.output}"
    output_binding:
      exported_file: "output"
    config:
      output_format: "markdown"
      encoding: "utf-8"
      file_naming: "${workflow.input.article_id}-translated.md"

error_handling:
  default_strategy: "fail_fast"
  retry_policy:
    max_attempts: 2
    backoff_multiplier: 1.5
    max_delay_seconds: 30
  debug_on_failure: true
  debug_agent: null
  
workflow_triggers:
  - event: "manual_execution"
    description: "用户手动触发，需提供 source_article 参数"
    
workflow_outputs:
  - id: markdown_file
    source: "${tasks.output_export.output.exported_file}"
    type: "file"
    description: "最终的中文 Markdown 文件"
    
  - id: translation_report
    source: "${tasks.quality_assessment.output.quality_metrics}"
    type: "json"
    description: "翻译质量报告和统计信息"

workers.description: 输入验证、文本预处理、核心翻译、Markdown格式化
workers.agent_md_content:
# Translator Agent

职责：执行英→中翻译、文本预处理、Markdown 格式化。
步骤：输入验证 → 预处理 → 翻译 → 格式化。
输入：英文新闻文章。
输出：格式化的中文 Markdown 内容。

workers.description: 质量检查、输出验证、文件导出
workers.agent_md_content:
# Quality Checker Agent

职责：质量审阅、输出验证、文件导出。
步骤：质量评估 → 自动修复 → 文件导出。
输入：格式化的翻译内容。
输出：最终 Markdown 文件。

dag_diagram: input_validation → text_preprocessing → core_translation → markdown_formatting → quality_assessment → output_export

design_decisions.step_compression_rationale: 原分析8步压缩为6步：合并验证步骤(1)、预处理+术语识别(2)、翻译(3)、格式化(4)、质量检查+一致性验证(5)、输出(6)
design_decisions.worker_allocation: 2个Worker，分工清晰：translator_01处理输入→翻译，quality_checker_01处理检查→输出
design_decisions.model_selection: opus用于翻译(需要语义理解)，sonnet用于质量检查(需要分析能力)
design_decisions.automation_strategy: max_interventions=0，工作流完全自动化，不设人工检查点，通过max_attempts和auto_fix_minor_issues实现自我恢复
design_decisions.error_handling: fail_fast策略，最多重试1次，确保快速失败而不是长时间挂起

required_inputs.name: source_article
required_inputs.description: 英文新闻文章内容或文件路径

required_inputs.name: article_id
required_inputs.description: 文章标识符，用于输出文件命名

optional_inputs.name: terminology_hints
optional_inputs.description: 自定义术语表（可选，加速翻译）

validation_results.notes: 工作流设计完整，所有依赖关系正确，无循环依赖
